mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TENANT ( TENANT_ID, TENANT_NM, TENANT_SLUG, STATUS_CD, OWNER_USER_ID, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tenantNm}, #{tenantSlug}, COALESCE(#{statusCd}, 'ACTIVE'), #{ownerUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT TENANT_ID, TENANT_NM, TENANT_SLUG, STATUS_CD, OWNER_USER_ID, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT FROM TENANT WHERE TENANT_ID = #{tenantId}
SELECT TENANT_ID, TENANT_NM, TENANT_SLUG, STATUS_CD, OWNER_USER_ID, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT FROM TENANT WHERE TENANT_SLUG = #{tenantSlug}
mapper.update: UPDATE TENANT SET OWNER_USER_ID = #{ownerUserId}, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE TENANT_ID = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TENANT_MEMBER ( TENANT_ID, USER_ID, TENANT_ROLE_CD, MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, COALESCE(#{tenantRoleCd}, 'MEMBER'), COALESCE(#{membershipStatusCd}, 'ACTIVE'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (TENANT_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET TENANT_ROLE_CD = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.TENANT_ROLE_CD, TENANT_MEMBER.TENANT_ROLE_CD), MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, TENANT_MEMBER.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD), LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.sql: t.TENANT_ID, t.TENANT_NM, t.TENANT_SLUG, u.USER_ID, COALESCE(u.LOGIN_ID, u.USER_ID) AS LOGIN_ID, u.USER_NM, u.USER_EMAIL, u.DEPT_ID, d.DEPT_NM, tm.TENANT_ROLE_CD, tm.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, tm.CRT_DT, tm.LAST_CHG_DT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM USERS u JOIN TENANT_MEMBER tm ON tm.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND tm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = u.DEPT_ID WHERE COALESCE(u.RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND UPPER(COALESCE(tm.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND UPPER(COALESCE(t.STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(COALESCE(u.LOGIN_ID, u.USER_ID)) = UPPER(#{identifier}) OR UPPER(u.USER_EMAIL) = UPPER(#{identifier}) OR UPPER(u.USER_ID) = UPPER(#{identifier}) )
AND u.TENANT_ID = #{tenantId}
ORDER BY CASE UPPER(COALESCE(tm.TENANT_ROLE_CD, 'MEMBER')) WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.TENANT_ID, u.USER_ID

SELECT
FROM USERS u JOIN TENANT_MEMBER tm ON tm.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND tm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = u.DEPT_ID WHERE ( u.USER_ID = #{userId} OR ( u.USER_EMAIL = (SELECT USER_EMAIL FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) AND COALESCE(u.USER_EMAIL, '') <> '' ) ) AND COALESCE(u.RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND UPPER(COALESCE(tm.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY CASE UPPER(COALESCE(tm.TENANT_ROLE_CD, 'MEMBER')) WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.TENANT_NM, u.USER_ID

SELECT
FROM USERS u JOIN TENANT_MEMBER tm ON tm.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND tm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = u.DEPT_ID WHERE UPPER(u.USER_EMAIL) = UPPER(#{userEmail}) AND COALESCE(u.RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND UPPER(COALESCE(tm.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY CASE UPPER(COALESCE(tm.TENANT_ROLE_CD, 'MEMBER')) WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.TENANT_NM, u.USER_ID

SELECT
FROM USERS u JOIN TENANT_MEMBER tm ON tm.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND tm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = u.DEPT_ID WHERE UPPER(u.USER_EMAIL) = UPPER(#{userEmail}) AND u.TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} AND COALESCE(u.RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND UPPER(COALESCE(tm.MEMBERSHIP_STATUS_CD, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM USERS u JOIN TENANT_MEMBER tm ON tm.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND tm.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = u.DEPT_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId} AND u.TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TENANT_INVITATION ( INVITATION_ID, TENANT_ID, INVITE_EMAIL, INVITE_NAME, TENANT_ROLE_CD, STATUS_CD, INVITATION_TOKEN, CREATED_BY_USER_ID, EXPIRES_AT, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT ) VALUES ( #{invitationId}, #{tenantId}, #{inviteEmail}, #{inviteName}, COALESCE(#{tenantRoleCd}, 'MEMBER'), COALESCE(#{statusCd}, 'PENDING'), #{invitationToken}, #{createdByUserId}, #{expiresAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT i.INVITATION_ID, i.TENANT_ID, t.TENANT_NM, t.TENANT_SLUG, i.INVITE_EMAIL, i.INVITE_NAME, i.TENANT_ROLE_CD, i.STATUS_CD, i.INVITATION_TOKEN, i.CREATED_BY_USER_ID, i.ACCEPTED_USER_ID, i.EXPIRES_AT, i.ACCEPTED_AT, i.CRT_DT, i.LAST_CHG_DT FROM TENANT_INVITATION i JOIN TENANT t ON t.TENANT_ID = i.TENANT_ID WHERE i.INVITATION_TOKEN = #{invitationToken}
mapper.update: UPDATE TENANT_INVITATION SET STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPTED', ACCEPTED_USER_ID = #{acceptedUserId}, ACCEPTED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE INVITATION_ID = #{invitationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CONTRACT_COMPANY_SETTING ( TENANT_ID, COMPANY_NM, SENDER_NM, SENDER_EMAIL, SENDER_TELNO, PROVIDER_NM, CRT_USER_ID, LAST_CHG_USER_ID, GUIDE_ACK_YN, ADMIN_READY_YN, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT ) SELECT #{tenantId}, #{companyNm}, 'Administrator', #{senderEmail}, '010-0000-0000', 'internal', #{userId}, #{userId}, 'N', 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CONTRACT_COMPANY_SETTING WHERE TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} )
